name: BrightData MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from BrightData (brightdata org, formerly Luminati) — the leading commercial web data platform. Enables AI agents to search the web, crawl websites, navigate pages, and extract data without getting blocked, using BrightData's proxy network and browser infrastructure. One unified MCP for web data acquisition at scale.
use_cases: Scraping and extracting structured data from websites without blocks from research agents
Web search with unblocked access to popular sites from data collection agents
Navigating dynamic JavaScript-heavy sites from data extraction agents
Competitive intelligence data gathering from market analysis agents
not_for: Simple web search (use Brave or Tavily — BrightData is for large-scale scraping)
Personal browsing automation without data collection needs
Scraping sites that prohibit scraping — always check robots.txt and ToS
best_when: An agent needs to collect web data at scale, access geo-restricted content, or bypass anti-bot measures — using BrightData's commercial proxy network and browser infrastructure for reliable web data acquisition.
avoid_when: You only need occasional web search (BrightData is enterprise-priced for high-volume use). Also: always verify ToS compliance — scraping some sites may violate their terms.

auth.notes: BrightData API key required. Paid BrightData account needed. Proxy zone credentials provided via dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial credit available; check brightdata.com for current offers
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based pricing by GB transferred; significant costs at scale
pricing.notes: BrightData is enterprise-priced. Trial credit available. Production use can be expensive depending on volume. One of the most established commercial web data platforms.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by your BrightData subscription tier and proxy zone capacity

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Web scraping collects data from third-party sites — review ToS of target sites
BrightData is usage-based — uncontrolled agent scraping can incur significant costs; set spending limits
Anti-circumvention laws apply in some jurisdictions — ensure scraping use is legally compliant
Official from BrightData (brightdata org) — well-maintained enterprise-grade implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Collects web data through BrightData's proxy network. API key auth. HTTPS. Data passes through BrightData infrastructure — review their data handling for sensitive scraping targets. GDPR compliant.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise-grade proxy infrastructure. Data routed through BrightData network. SOC2/ISO27001/GDPR certified. Verify ToS compliance for target sites.
